metadata.title: SalonBook.az — online booking 24/7
metadata.description: Let your clients book online themselves, 24/7. Create a personal booking link for your salon and share it.

Footer.tagline: Online booking for salons, barbershops and clinics in Azerbaijan. Let clients book themselves — 24/7.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Stop replying to booking messages on Instagram and WhatsApp. Create a personal link for your salon, share it — we handle the rest.
Landing.heroImageAlt: SalonBook.az online booking page — choosing service, staff and a time slot

features.title: Everything you need for bookings
features.subtitle: Simple tools that stop the messaging, fill the chair and keep your team in sync.

booking.title: 24/7 online booking
booking.body: Clients pick a free slot and book themselves, day or night — no need for you.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp reminders
whatsapp.body: Automatic confirmation and reminder messages — fewer no-shows.

overlap.title: Double-booking protection
overlap.body: Overlapping appointments for the same staff member are impossible — enforced at the database level.

team.title: Team and services
team.body: Separate working hours per staff member, service durations and buffer time between them.

slots.title: Smart free slots
slots.body: Available slots are computed precisely in real time, based on duration and buffer.

roi.title: ROI analytics
roi.body: Revenue earned from online bookings, returning clients and your most profitable services — at a glance, on every plan.

steps.title: Get started in three steps
steps.subtitle: Setup takes minutes. No technical knowledge required.

profile.title: Build your profile
profile.body: Add services, staff and working hours — in just a few minutes.

share.title: Share your link
share.body: Put your personal booking link in your Instagram bio or on WhatsApp.

accept.title: Accept bookings
accept.body: Your calendar fills automatically, reminders send themselves. You focus on the work.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
pricing.footnote: All prices are in AZN. Payments are currently activated manually.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Didn't find what you were looking for? Write to us — we'll help.

finalCta.title: Create your booking link today
finalCta.subtitle: Set it up in minutes, share it with your clients and watch the bookings come in on their own.

items.a: Create your salon, add services, staff and working hours. You get a personal link — share it in your Instagram bio or on WhatsApp. Clients open the link, pick a free slot and book themselves.

items.q: Do clients need to install an app?
items.a: No. The booking page is an ordinary web link — it opens in a browser on a phone or computer. No download or account required.
A booking confirmation and a reminder before the appointment are sent automatically. Messages are delivered by a separate background service — so booking itself never waits.
Two confirmed appointments for the same staff member can never overlap — this is enforced at the database level. Even if two people pick the same time at once, only one goes through.

items.q: Can I use it for free?
items.a: Yes. The free plan includes 2 staff and up to 50 bookings per month. With the invite code (EARLYBIRD) the Basic plan is completely free for 3 months.
Payments are currently manual — you pick your plan, we activate it. Automatic online payments and deposits (no-show protection) are in the works for Pro.
